recommendations.title: Arif V 216
recommendations.overview: After 8 years, Arif's old friend 216 from planet GORA pays a visit to Earth.Together they go on a quest where they'll be visiting 60's.

recommendations.title: Moon Man
recommendations.overview: Working as a maintenance crew member on the moon, Duguyue is left behind after the evacuation mission forgets about him. A meteorite then destroys planet Earth, leaving him as the only man left alive in existence.

recommendations.title: Cocoon: The Return
recommendations.overview: The reinvigorated elderly group that left Earth comes back to visit their relatives. Will they all decide to go back to the planet where no one grows old, or will they be tempted to remain on Earth?

recommendations.title: Doraemon the Movie: Nobita's Little Star Wars 2021
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: During summer vacation Nobita picks up a small rocket containing Papi, a palm-sized alien president escaping rebels on his home planet Pirika.

recommendations.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
recommendations.overview: The sole survivor of an interplanetary rescue mission lands on the planet of the apes, and uncovers a horrible secret beneath the surface.

recommendations.title: Good Boy!
recommendations.overview: An intergalactic dog pilot from Sirius (the dog star), visits Earth to verify the rumors that dogs have failed to take over the planet.

recommendations.title: Space Battleship Yamato

recommendations.title: Doppelgänger
recommendations.overview: A planet is discovered in the same orbit as Earth's but is located on the exact opposite side of the sun, making it not visible from Earth. The European Space Exploration Council decide to send American astronaut Glenn Ross and British scientist John

recommendations.title: Planet Hulk
recommendations.overview: When the Hulk's presence on Earth becomes too great a risk, the Illuminati trick him to board a shuttle destined for a planet where he will be able to live in peace, and launch it into space. The Hulk's struggle to escape causes the shuttle to malfun

recommendations.title: Jurassic Galaxy
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a ship of space explorers crash land on an unknown planet. They're soon met with some of their worst fears as they discover the planet is inhabited by monstrous dinosaurs.
